title: Keurig Dr Pepper: Buy For Dividend Growth And Safety
text: Keurig Dr Pepper is the market leader in single-serve coffee systems and K-Cup pods. The company has well-known coffee, soda, water, tea, and other brands.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Q4 Earnings Miss, Sales Beat Estimates
text: Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) Q4 results gain from the robust performance in its cold beverages, double-digit growth across all four segments and better pricing. KDP issues an upbeat 2023 view.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 23, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Maria Sceppaguercio - Chief Corporate Affairs Officer Robert Gamgort - Chairman and Chief Executive Oficer Sudhanshu Priyadarshi - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Securities Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Kevin Grundy - Jefferies Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Brett Cooper - Consumer Edge Research Bonnie Herzog - Goldman Sachs Filippo Falorni - Citi Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Keurig Dr Pepper's Earnings Call for the Fourth Quarter and Full-Year of 2022.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1.96% and 0.22%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Factors Likely to Influence Keurig's (KDP) Q4 Earnings
text: A recovery in the coffee business and continued strength in Packaged Beverages are likely to have aided Keurig's (KDP) Q4 performance. Inflationary pressures are likely to have been concerning.

title: What To Expect From Keurig Dr Pepper's Q4?
text: We expect KDP stock to trend higher, with Q4 revenues likely falling in line and earnings slightly above the consensus estimates.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper: A Leader In The Beverage Industry
text: KDP is a leading coffee and beverage company in North America. KDP holds a wide array of leading brands in soft drinks, specialty coffee and tea, water, and others markets.

title: 10 Large Cap Stocks Trading Close to 52-Week Lows
text: 2022 has been a bad year for the equity market, with inflation and interest rates being the primary factors weighing on stocks throughout 2022.
